scripts.deploy: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=$env:GCP_PROJECT_ID; if (-not $p) { throw 'Set GCP_PROJECT_ID' }; $r=($env:GCP_REGION); if (-not $r) { $r='us-central1' }; $s=($env:CLOUD_RUN_SERVICE_NAME); if (-not $s) { $s='dp-proj-00-02-backend' }; gcloud run deploy $s --source . --region $r --project $p --allow-unauthenticated"
scripts.deploy:logs: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=$env:GCP_PROJECT_ID; if (-not $p) { throw 'Set GCP_PROJECT_ID' }; $r=($env:GCP_REGION); if (-not $r) { $r='us-central1' }; $s=($env:CLOUD_RUN_SERVICE_NAME); if (-not $s) { $s='dp-proj-00-02-backend' }; gcloud run services logs read $s --region $r --project $p --limit 50"
